creator: raimeetravel
caption:
the travel product I take with me EVERYWHERE! #AMDpartner 

At this point I couldn’t function without my @amd laptop so I had to upgrade to the flip! As always, let me know if you have any questions 🫶🏻

#travelproducts

transcription.text: waking up in another city because my job has me flying all over the world at least once a week and yes it is as crazy as it sounds so i really need reliable products like my amd laptop at this point there is no way i could travel or work without this and i feel like people underestimate how important it is to have tech you love when you travel this one is super lightweight so i'm not dying carrying it through airports the battery lasts forever and it can handle me editing content while having 38 tabs open i've also been using all of the ai tools built into it to help organize itineraries brainstorm content ideas and honestly i'm just making my life way easier when i'm constantly moving around this has become one of my favorite things to pack also i love the color if you travel a lot you know your laptop kind of becomes your office your entertainment system travel planner and emotional support device all in one so you've got to pick the right one comment amd and i'll send you the link to mine
